theme_archetype.name: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury (Adapted for High-End SaaS)
theme_archetype.description: A premium, architectural, and crafted dashboard feel. Blends the deep trust and depth of Royal Blue with the vibrant, action-oriented warmth of Sankalp Orange. No generic SaaS purple/indigo 'AI slop'. Focuses on crisp geometry, glassmorphism for overlays, and structured density.

headings.description: Distinctive, geometric, architectural. Brings a premium, structural feel.

body.description: Clean, highly legible for dense dashboards, pairs perfectly with Outfit.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6 for tight data correlation.
spacing_and_layout.container_padding: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards. No text collision with borders.
spacing_and_layout.card_radius: rounded-xl to rounded-2xl. Not too pill-like, maintaining structural architectural geometry.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px subtle borders (border-border) to define structure, dropping heavy drop-shadows.

components.sidebar: Royal Blue tinted very dark (#050B14) in dark mode. Active states marked with a vertical Sankalp Orange bar on the left edge. Include badges for unread/scheduled counts.
components.kpi_cards: Flat background with 1px border. Hover effect: slight lift (-translate-y-1) + border color transitions to primary/30 + subtle primary-tinted glow.
components.content_studio_composer: Split-screen layout. Left: Editor form + AI assist button (Orange). Right: Live preview morphing based on selected platform (FB, IG, X).
components.visual_calendar: Grid structure. Days with posts have colored chips matching platform brand colors (e.g., Meta blue, IG gradient).
components.integration_cards: Use 'Tracing Beam' or subtle neon-glow active state around connected platforms. Display platform brand logos via lucide-react or react-icons.
components.review_cards: Sentiment analysis badges (Success green for positive, Warning amber for neutral, Error red for negative). Star ratings in Orange. AI reply suggestion drawer slides out.
components.ai_command_assistant: Global Cmd+K slide-over panel. Glassmorphism overlay (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60). Remove any purple slop; use sophisticated Blue/Orange subtle grain.
components.login_split_screen: Left: High-end architectural interior design image covering full height with a dark gradient overlay. Right: Clean, centered login form with Google OAuth and Email.

motion.page_transitions: Fade in and slight slide-up (translate-y-4 to 0, opacity 0 to 1) for main content areas.
motion.micro_interactions: Scale buttons to 0.98 on active (click). Smooth disclosure for accordions/drawers.

testing.data_testid_rule: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button'). Use kebab-case, role-based.

critical_rules.1: DO NOT use any purple, violet, or indigo colors. Purge existing 'AI slop' gradients.
critical_rules.2: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Arial for headings. Use Outfit.
critical_rules.3: Apply 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, inputs, and major layout sections.
critical_rules.4: Ensure proper contrast for all text, especially on the #F47B20 orange accents.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' in your base index.html/CSS.
Configure tailwind.config.js to extend colors with 'brand-orange': '#F47B20' and 'brand-blue': '#1F4FA1'. Set up dark/light mode variations.
Use Lucide React (already installed) or react-icons for platform logos (Facebook, X, IG, etc.).
Replace any generic purple AI gradients with a sophisticated 'blue and orange' textured look.
Implement the login screen using the 'login_hero_image' from media_assets in the left pane.
Build the dashboard using the 'Control Room' grid layout described in spacing_and_layout.
